structural_description: The image contains a black background with a speech bubble in the center containing the text 'Not all matrices can become diagonal'. Below the speech bubble, there are four blue characters with a pi symbol, and to the right, there is a brown character with a pi symbol. The characters are arranged in a horizontal line.
reading_order: Start with the speech bubble, then read the characters from left to right
layout: The characters are arranged in a horizontal line on a black background.
text_readout: Not all matrices can become diagonal
spatial_map: The speech bubble is in the center of the image, above the characters. The characters are arranged in a horizontal line below the speech bubble.
colors_styles: The characters are blue and brown with a pi symbol, and the background is black.
